# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 522. Commercial Driver's Licenses
##### § 522.024 — Additional Testing

To ensure compliance with the federal act and to promote the systematic conversion to commercial driver’s licenses, the department may require the commercial driver’s license testing of a person to whom the department has previously issued a driver’s license that authorizes the driving of a vehicle that may be subject to this chapter. The testing may be required before the expiration of an existing license.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*
